title: Iced Italian Agemono-Deep-Fried Italian Chuck Roast Tagliatelle
description: A tasty and refreshing Italian dish featuring chuck roast, deep-fried in an agemono-style batter, served in a lotus leaf wrap with a side of iced sauce.
instructions: Heat a large pot of salted water and bring to a boil. Cook tagliatelle pasta until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, parmesan cheese, and italian seasoning. Add eggs and mix until a smooth batter forms. Pour the batter into a large fryer or a deep frying pan with about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil. Heat the oil to 375°F. Cut the chuck roast into thin strips and coat evenly in the flour mixture. Fry the chunk roast strips until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove the fried meat from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil. Warm the lotus leaves in the microwave for 10 seconds. Assemble the dish by placing a portion of cooked tagliatelle pasta on the center of each lotus leaf, followed by a few strips of fried chuck roast and a dollop of melted butter. Fold the bottom half of the lotus leaf over the filling and then fold in the sides and roll up the leaf to form a neat package. Serve immediately and enjoy!
